title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on war, peace and international cooperation.

questions.question: Do you think the world today is more or less stable than it was fifty years ago, and what factors have contributed to this?
How effective do you think international bodies such as the United Nations are at preventing conflict, and what reforms might make them stronger?

script.text: Do you think the world today is more or less stable than it was fifty years ago, and what factors have contributed to this?
How effective do you think international bodies such as the United Nations are at preventing conflict, and what reforms might make them stronger?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
